import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(text)
  let a = parse::<Int>(toks[0]).ok_or("bad A")?
  let b = parse::<Int>(toks[1]).ok_or("bad B")?
  let s = parse::<Int>(toks[2]).ok_or("bad S")?
  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
